title: Centipede Control Morris Heights | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional centipede control in Morris Heights, Bronx. Fast, effective extermination services for homes and apartments. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Centipedes are a common problem in Morris Heights homes and apartment buildings, thriving in the damp basements and older structures throughout this historic Bronx neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive centipede control services tailored to Morris Heights residents, with pricing from $350 to $550 depending on the size and severity of your infestation. Our experienced technicians understand the unique pest challenges faced by buildings near University Heights and along the Grand Concourse corridor.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Morris Heights and the surrounding Bronx communities for years, with deep knowledge of the centipede species common to pre-war apartment buildings and residential homes in the area. Our technicians arrive quickly, use safe and effective treatments, and provide follow-up care to ensure your Morris Heights property remains centipede-free.
localContext: Morris Heights' mix of century-old apartment buildings, multi-family homes near Highbridge Park, and properties along Jerome Avenue often experience moisture issues that attract centipedes to basements, bathrooms, and ground-level units. The neighborhood's proximity to wooded areas and aging infrastructure creates ideal conditions for these pests to enter homes through foundation cracks and pipe openings.

faqs.question: Why are centipedes so common in Morris Heights buildings?
faqs.answer: Morris Heights has many older buildings constructed in the early 1900s with stone foundations and basement areas that retain moisture. Centipedes are attracted to damp, dark spaces and often enter through cracks in foundations, gaps around pipes, and basement windows common in pre-war construction throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does centipede control cost in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: Our centipede control services in Morris Heights range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and whether treatment is needed for multiple units or common areas. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are centipedes dangerous to my family or pets?
faqs.answer: While centipedes can deliver a painful bite if handled, they are generally not dangerous to humans or pets. However, their presence indicates moisture problems and can signal other pest issues. Our treatments are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a centipede problem in Morris Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Morris Heights residents in most cases. Our technicians are familiar with the neighborhood and can quickly reach properties throughout the area, from apartments near the Concourse to homes along Featherbed Lane, to address your centipede infestation promptly.
